title: Double logo size in Navigation and Footer components

requirements.summary: Increase logo size in Navigation component by 100 percent
acceptanceCriteria: Logo image in Navigation.tsx uses h-32 height class (doubled from h-16)
Navigation container height is adjusted proportionally to h-40 (doubled from h-24)
Logo displays correctly in both desktop and mobile views without layout breaks
Logo remains properly aligned with navigation menu items

file_operations.description: Double the logo size by changing the height class from h-16 to h-32, and adjust the navigation container height from h-24 to h-40 to maintain proportional spacing. Ensure the logo remains properly aligned with navigation menu items in both desktop and mobile views.

requirements.summary: Increase logo size in Footer component by 100 percent
acceptanceCriteria: Logo image in Footer.tsx uses h-28 height class (doubled from h-14)
Logo displays correctly in the footer layout without overflow or distortion
Footer layout remains balanced with the larger logo size
Logo maintains aspect ratio and clarity at the increased size

file_operations.description: Double the logo size by changing the height class from h-14 to h-28 to match the proportional increase applied in Navigation. Ensure the footer layout remains balanced and the logo displays correctly without overflow or distortion.
